query: DynamoDB analytics limitations query flexibility real-time analytics
answer: DynamoDB is not inherently designed for analytics; it excels in transactional workloads. For real-time analytics, third-party tools like Tinybird are often used. Flexibility in querying is limited compared to traditional SQL databases.

results.title: Is DynamoDB good for analytics? - Quora
results.snippet: The standard answer is - no, it was designed as a transactional database and doesn't support the SQL queries necessary for analytics.
